summary: Iteration 48 - Admin Matches Section Rebuild COMPLETE. All features verified: (1) IST dates displayed correctly (e.g., '28 Mar, 07:30 pm'), (2) Match cards with status badges (COMPLETED/LIVE/UPCOMING), (3) Match status toggle works (upcoming→live, live→upcoming unlive), (4) Add Contest form with template dropdown, (5) Contest card shows 5 action buttons (Make Live/Unlive, AI Resolve, AI Answers, Manual Resolve, Delete), (6) Contest status transitions work (open→live→open), (7) Delete contest with Hindi confirmation, (8) Sync IPL Schedule button works, (9) Questions display with Hindi text (16 questions visible), (10) Max 5 contests per match enforced. Backend: 15/16 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All UI flows verified.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - This is a React hydration warning from the visual editor wrapper, not a functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: AdminMatchPage.jsx: Well-structured unified page with no sub-tabs
IST timezone conversion using toLocaleString with 'Asia/Kolkata' timezone - correct implementation
Match status transitions properly validated in backend (VALID_TRANSITIONS dict)
Contest status transitions: open/live/locked cycle works correctly
Max 5 contests per match enforced in both frontend (UI count) and backend (400 error)
Template badge clickable to expand 16 questions with Hindi text
Difficulty badges: MEDIUM (yellow), HARD (red) with points displayed
Delete confirmation shows Hindi text: 'contest delete karna hai?'
Sync IPL Schedule shows success message with counts
seed_data_creation: Created test contests during UI testing (TEST_Iteration48_Contest, TEST UI Contest) - cleaned up via delete
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified Admin Matches section rebuild. Key verified features: 1) Admin login flow works (Get Started → Phone → PIN → Admin Dashboard). 2) Matches bottom nav → unified match list (no sub-tabs). 3) Match cards show IST dates (e.g., '28 Mar, 07:30 pm'), status badges (COMPLETED/LIVE/UPCOMING), and scores. 4) Click match to expand → shows venue, full date, and 3 action buttons for UPCOMING matches (Make Live, Add Contest, Make Unlive). 5) Make Live changes status to LIVE, Make Unlive changes back to UPCOMING. 6) Add Contest form: template dropdown, name input, Create Contest button. 7) Contest card shows 5 action buttons: Make Live/Unlive, AI Resolve, AI Answers, Manual Resolve, Delete. 8) Contest status toggle: open→live→open works. 9) Delete contest shows Hindi confirmation dialog. 10) Template badge 'Full Match Predictions (16Q)' clickable to expand questions. 11) Questions display with Hindi text and difficulty badges. 12) Sync IPL Schedule button works - shows 'Synced! X new, Y updated, Z linked'. 13) Max 5 contests per match enforced. 14) DC vs PBKS is LIVE, MI vs CSK is UPCOMING with 2 contests.

sample_questions: Q1: आज पहली पारी में कितने रन बनेंगे? (MEDIUM 91pts)
Q2: आज पहली पारी में कितने विकेट गिरेंगे? (MEDIUM 77pts)
Q3: आज पहली पारी में कितने छक्के लगेंगे? (HARD 90pts)
Q5: आज का मैच कौन जीतेगा? (HARD 85pts)
